info.name: Shivaay Dairy Management API
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Shivaay Dairy Management System.

**Setup:**
1. Set `baseUrl` variable to your server (default: http://localhost:8080)
2. Run **Login as Admin** — token is saved automatically to `adminToken`
3. Run **Login as Delivery Partner** — token is saved to `partnerToken`
4. All other requests use these tokens automatically.

item.name: Get Line by ID (with customers in order)
Create Partner Profile (links to existing user)
Get Partner's Daily List (Admin view by ID)
Get My Daily List (Partner — uses JWT)
Update Delivery Status (Partner — uses partner token)
Mark Delivery as Mistake (voids + recalculates bill)
